nasb.text: During that night the king could not sleep so he gave an order to bring the book of records, the chronicles, and they were read before the king.

esv.text: On that night the king could not sleep. And he gave orders to bring the book of memorable deeds, the chronicles, and they were read before the king.

cnv.text: 那一夜，王睡不著覺，就吩咐人把史記，就是年鑒拿來，在王面前誦讀。

ccb.text: 那夜王睡不着觉，就吩咐人拿史书念给他听。
